arabic_text:
آدم
نوح
ابراہیم
موسیٰ
عیسیٰ
محمد
عبد اللہ
باب عبد اللہ

محمد

english_text:
Adam — 7 Imams
Noah — 7 Imams (incl. Adam)
Abraham — 7 Imams
Musa — 7 Imams
Isa — 7 Imams
Muhammad — 7 Imams (incl. Hasan, Husayn, Ali, Muhammad, Ja'far, Isma'il, Muhammad)
Mahdi — final
Abdullah
Baab Abdullah
Ahmad
Baab Ahmad
Husayn
Baab Husayn
alt_text: A 7-column grid table mapping the 7 successive prophets to their respective 7 Imams. Rows top-to-bottom: Adam → 7 Imams; Noah → 7 Imams (Adam included as Imam 1 in some readings); Abraham → 7 Imams; Musa → 7 Imams; Isa → 7 Imams; Muhammad → 7 Imams (Hasan, Husayn, Ali, Muhammad, Ja'far, Isma'il, Muhammad). Final row: Mahdi with the Baab figures (Baab Abdullah, Baab Ahmad, Baab Husayn). The right column lists the prophet name (yellow highlight), middle columns show Imam (1) through Imam (6) labels, the leftmost column gives the next prophet (yellow highlight) — signaling that each prophet's 7th Imam transitions to the next prophet.
notes: Classic Ismaili cyclical-prophethood table: each of the 7 prophets has 7 Imams whose 7th Imam ascends to become the next prophet. For Muhammad, the 7 Imams are named explicitly (Hasan, Husayn, Ali, Muhammad, Ja'far, Isma'il, Muhammad). The final Mahdi row identifies the Baab figures for the post-Muhammadan cycle.
